images.alt:
A cinematic fantasy disaster scene depicts a devastated city under attack by enormous dragons. In the foreground, several human figures stand with their backs to the viewer on a rubble-strewn slope, watching destruction unfold below. Fires burn throughout the city, sending smoke and sparks into the air. Dominating the right side of the image is a massive dragon with a pale, horn-covered face, jagged teeth, and dark scales fading into the surrounding fog. Its head alone appears larger than nearby buildings. Behind it, another dragon emerges from the smoke with partially extended wings, its immense form barely visible through the haze. The city below is a patchwork of damaged structures, scattered flames, and drifting ash. The atmosphere is thick with gray smoke, reducing visibility and creating a sense of scale and hopelessness. The contrast between the tiny survivors and the towering dragons emphasizes humanity's vulnerability in the face of overwhelming destruction.
Keywords: dragons, apocalypse, cityscape, destruction, fire, smoke, survivors, fantasy, monsters, scale, ruins, cinematic
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A towering dark-skinned queen or celestial monarch stands atop a jagged black pedestal at the center of a grand hall. Her flowing black gown appears to dissolve into smoke, shadow, and fractured stone as it cascades down the structure beneath her. In her raised hand, she holds a glowing staff that projects a brilliant beam of light upward through the scene. Behind and around her, immense ribbons of molten gold energy swirl in a sweeping arc, forming a luminous vortex that dominates the composition. The golden currents resemble liquid fire, sparks, and windblown silk, creating a dramatic contrast against the dark environment. Tattered golden banners hang in the background, partially obscured by haze and shafts of light. Small figures kneel at the base of the monument-like platform, emphasizing the immense scale and authority of the central figure. Flecks of glowing embers and drifting particles fill the air, while deep blacks, charcoal grays, and brilliant golds create a powerful black-and-gold palette. The overall atmosphere feels regal, mythic, and triumphant, as though a divine ruler is channeling overwhelming cosmic power before a gathered audience.
Keywords:
queen, gold energy, black gown, staff, fantasy, monument, banners, divine power, vortex, dramatic lighting, epic scale, royalty
Attribution line (must appear exactly as written):
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt: A seated humanoid android figure framed inside a dark circular industrial hatch, with glossy white porcelain-like head and limb armor, amber eyes, fine black seam lines running from scalp to cheeks, pointed ears, long black hair, dangling segmented metal earrings, white shoulder caps, articulated white forearms, black claw-tipped fingers, and a high-contrast biomechanical torso made from ribbed black plating, exposed joint channels, and polished shell-like chest armor; the figure fills the vertical frame from head to knees in a centered seated pose, one knee raised close to the lower right foreground and one hand resting low at the left edge, with a heavy riveted door ring and dark mechanical wall panels anchoring the background; cool controlled studio light from upper front left creates bright specular patches on the white curved armor, soft reflections on the black chest plates, crisp highlights along finger joints and earrings, and deep readable shadows in the hatch recesses, while the amber eyes form the only warm accent; photographed as a cinematic sci-fi portrait with a 100mm lens at f/2.2, sharp focus on the eyes, face seams, upper torso, and nearest hand, shallow depth of field, symmetrical close cropping, restrained white, black, gunmetal, and amber palette, soft highlight rolloff, tactile ceramic gloss, fine skin-like surface texture, believable mechanical layering, and physically plausible contact between seated posture, armor shells, ribbed understructure, hair, jewelry, and industrial doorway.

record.text:
おはようございます
#aiart #AI画像 #AIアート #AIイラスト

【断食を模倣した食事法が歯周病の炎症を軽減】

EBIS世界の最新健康・栄養ニュース
2026年6月24日 04:29

短期間の低カロリー食、いわゆる断食模倣食を行うことで、歯周病に関連する炎症マーカーが低下する可能性があるようだ、という研究報告。

英国キングス・カレッジ・ロンドンの研究チームは、スペインの複数の病院から参加した歯周病患者28名を対象に、5日間の制限食を行う群と、通常の食事を続ける対照群に分けて検討を行った。

＃栄養　＃健康

詳しくはこちら↓
note.com/linkdediet/n...

external.description: 短期間の低カロリー食、いわゆる断食模倣食を行うことで、歯周病に関連する炎症マーカーが低下する可能性があるようだ、という研究報告。  歯周炎は、重症の歯肉疾患であり、世界中で多くの人にみられる。心疾患や糖尿病など、全身の健康問題とも関連することが知られている。標準的な治療では、歯の周囲の感染部位を清掃することが中心となるが、近年は食事などの生活習慣が治療効果に影響する可能性にも注目が集まっている。 ...
external.title: 断食を模倣した食事法が歯周病の炎症を軽減｜EBIS世界の最新健康・栄養ニュース
